mapper.select:
SELECT SUM(if((technician_id = #{id} AND TO_DAYS(create_time) = TO_DAYS(NOW())),1,0)) todayIndent, SUM(if(pay_state = 1 AND technician_id= #{id},price,0)) allEarnings, SUM(if((technician_id = #{id}),1,0)) allIndentCount, SUM(if((technician_id = #{id} AND state = 1),1,0)) newIntentCount, SUM(if((technician_id = #{id} AND (state = 2 OR state = 3 OR state = 4 OR state = 5 OR state = 6) ),1,0)) inServiceCount, SUM(if((technician_id = #{id} AND state = 7),1,0)) obligationCount, SUM(if((technician_id = #{id} AND state = 8),1,0)) toEvaluateCount, SUM(if((technician_id = #{id} AND state = 10),1,0)) cancelledCount
FROM app_spray_paint_indent;

SELECT a.user_id userId,a.user_b_id userBId,CONCAT('')cleanType, CONCAT('喷漆')cleanName,brand_type carName,a.spray_paint_number cleanIndentNumber, a.price amount,a.state indentState,b.url imgUrl,a.is_evaluation isEvaluation, a.create_time createTime,CONCAT(4) resource,CONCAT('') rescueName,pick_address currentPosition FROM app_spray_paint_indent as a LEFT JOIN app_spray_paint_img as b ON a.id = b.spray_paint_id WHERE a.technician_id = #{id} AND b.`index` = 1 and b.type = 1
AND (a.state = 1 or a.state = 2)
AND (a.state = 3 or a.state = 4 or a.state = 5 or a.state = 6)
AND a.state = 7
AND a.state = 8
AND a.state = 10
order by createTime DESC LIMIT #{pagesize},20
SELECT id FROM app_user_coupon WHERE order_number = #{cleanIndentNumber}
